attacking_style: Launches solo attacks from breakaways in the final 20km, willing to commit fully despite long odds against organized peloton chases.
team_tactics: Operates independently in breakaway scenarios; no visible team support structure in long-range break situations.
terrain_preference: Unknown - single observation on flat/rolling UAE terrain insufficient to determine clear preference, though showed willingness to attack on open roads.
vulnerability: Solo efforts fade against organized peloton chase in final kilometers when WorldTour teams commit to catching breaks.
key_patterns: Solo attacks from established breakaways rather than staying collaborative until finale.
Capable of sustaining 2+ minute advantages solo for extended periods mid-finale.
High-risk tactical aggression prioritizing solo glory over breakaway cooperation odds.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows aggressive racing capability but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
